title: Proactive disclosure - Canada.ca
content:
## Proactive disclosure : Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada
Proactive disclosure of departmental information mandated under Bill C-58

## Services and information

### Travel and hospitality expenses
Find travel and hospitality expenses incurred by the minister and senior executives.

### Grants and contribution awards over $25,000
Search grants and contributions awarded by Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC).

### Contracts over $10,000
Search contracts awarded to vendors by or on behalf of IRCC.
Find the transition binders given to new ministers and deputy ministers when they join the department.

### Committee appearances
Find the briefing materials given to the minister or the deputy minister when they appear before parliamentary committees.

### Position reclassifications
Find information on the reclassification of occupied positions within IRCC.

### Completed access to information requests
Find a monthly list of summaries of completed access to information requests processed by the department.

### Briefing note titles and numbers
Explore briefing notes received by ministers and deputy heads by title.

### Question period notes
Find question period notes prepared for ministers.
